title: Emmin Whitehat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Emmin Whitehat''' was a rogue [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he caused trouble to the Corellian entrepreneur [[Mindra Nox]], until she finally found out where he lived and hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to take him out. Although Whitehat intercepted the message, he was unable to prevent the spacer from fulfilling his mission.

==Behind the scenes==
Whitehat is mentioned in the description of a mission called "Criminal Slicer Emmin Whitehat" in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] that players can get at Mission Terminals on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
